title: SEC6: make_did_key/validate_did_key separation preserves auditability
description: make_did_key() [identity.rs:152-157] is pure encoding; validate_did_key() [identity.rs:166-190] is pure validation. Separation allows each to be tested and audited independently. Encoding logic is deterministic (verified by test_make_did_key_deterministic), validation is strict. This split makes it impossible for validation to accidentally accept invalid formats or for encoding to produce non-canonical output.
